name: Simple Herbal Gifts: Tummy Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the ingredients and mix well.
2. Store in a tightly closed container.
This pleasant, fragrant blend is soothing after a big meal or when the holidays get hectic. Pack in a tea canister with a ball or spoon infuser, or use self-sealing tea bags, which can be sealed with an iron. Steep 1 heaping teaspoon in a cup of boiling water for 1 minute. Sweeten with honey to taste.
